subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the hem of the Covenant! Thy detailed letter was received and thy questions were noted [3.5s]... ...Those matters of major importance which constitute the foundation of the Law of God are explicitly recorded in the Text, but subsidiary laws are left to the House of Justice
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متشبث بذیل المیثاق منشور مسطور منظور آمد و سوالات مفصله ملاحظه گردید ولو
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @laws of marriage and dowry, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @importance of authoritative interpretation
